creator: tochansky@tochlab.net
text:
Created attachment 224577
Screenshot from ip-kvm.

I have a ASUS RS500-E6-PS4 server.

On the first boot after installation 13.0-RELEASE hangs at "FreeBSD/x86 bootstrap loader, Revision 1.1".

After few tries I decided to install 12.2-RELEASE and upgrade to 13.0-RELEASE manually. 12.2 boots fine without any suspicious messages in dmesg.

After "freebsd-update -R 13.0-RELEASE upgrade" I was asked to reboot and system hangs again.


Root FS is on raidz1.

Any ideas?
